channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marc Guehi Misses Carabao Cup Medal Despite Being at Final
item.description: Manchester City clinched the 2026 Carabao Cup after beating Arsenal at Wembley Stadium, but not all City players were awarded medals. Marc Guehi, who joined City during the January transfer window, wa...

item.title: The Economic Dangers of Relying on Grants in South Africa
item.description: The reader letter argues that South Africa cannot sustain itself on government grants alone. It criticises the idea of depending on grants as a long-term solution, stating that the survival of a natio...

item.title: Important Passport Mistakes to Avoid Before You Travel
item.description: Make you no joke with your passport o. This small but powerful document fit make or break your trip. One common mistake na to hand over your original passport as deposit when renting car or jet ski ab...

item.title: Tinubu’s UK Visit Strengthens Nigeria-UK Relations, Says Senator
item.description: Senator Jimoh Ibrahim, wey be Chairman of the Senate Committee on Inter-Parliamentary Affairs, don hail President Bola Tinubu over him recent official visit to the United Kingdom. According to Ibrahim...

item.title: EPFO Plans Auto-Settlement for Aadhaar-Verified Inoperative Accounts with Unclaimed Funds
item.description: The Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) has intensified its efforts to help subscribers withdraw unclaimed balances lying in inoperative accounts. Approximately a quarter of the inoperative ...

item.title: Horoscope Forecast: March 23, 2026
item.description: Your daily horoscope for March 23, 2026, provided by Sally Brompton, offers guidance for each zodiac sign. Aries may need to adjust their plans as Saturn tests their resolve. Taurus should pay attenti...

item.title: Iran threatens closure of Strait of Hormuz after Trump's 48-hour ultimatum
item.description: Tensions between the US and Iran have escalated, with Tehran warning it could fully close the Strait of Hormuz in retaliation for US threats to attack its power plants. The threat came after US Presid...

item.title: Imran Khan receives third anti-VEGF eye injection at Pims, remains stable
item.description: Former prime minister and PTI founder, Imran Khan, underwent his third anti-VEGF intra-vitreal eye injection at the Pakistan Institute of Medical Sciences (Pims) in Islamabad on Monday. According to a...

item.title: New species discovered in Cambodia’s limestone caves highlight urgent need for conservation
item.description: The article recounts a wildlife researcher’s exploration of Cambodia’s karst limestone caves, where a team from the conservation organisation Fauna & Flora uncovered three new species of gecko, along ...

item.title: LIV Golf confirms 2027 Steyn City return amid tensions with Sunshine Tour
item.description: Sport Minister Gayton McKenzie has confirmed that LIV Golf will return to Steyn City next year, scheduled for 22 to 25 April 2027, following what he described as attempts to block this year’s tourname...

item.title: Democrats in Congress push to limit Trump's war powers over Iran
item.description: In the US, Congress is taking renewed efforts to limit President Donald Trump's military powers regarding Iran. Democratic leaders, led by House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, are pushing a new war ...

item.title: APC Governors Hold Important Meeting in Lagos Ahead of Party Primaries
item.description: Ahead of the APC's upcoming governorship primaries set for next month, 31 APC governors from across Nigeria gathered for a crucial meeting in Lagos on Sunday, March 23, 2026. The governors, who met at...

item.title: Iran warns of potential closure of Strait of Hormuz and retaliation against power plants after Trump's deadline
item.description: Iran has issued a stern warning that it may close the Strait of Hormuz, a key waterway for global oil shipments, and launch strikes against power plants in response to a 48-hour ultimatum set by forme...

item.title: Fact Check: Baste Duterte did not send chartered plane to repatriate OFWs from the Middle East
item.description: A viral Facebook reel falsely claims that Davao City Mayor Sebastian 'Baste' Duterte arranged a chartered flight via Philippine Airlines (PAL) to bring home overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) stranded i...

item.title: Deputy President Mashatile Emphasises Sustainable Employment and Skills Development in South Africa
item.description: Deputy President Paul Mashatile addressed the 2026 Annual Labour School in Pretoria, stressing that public employment programmes must go beyond creating temporary work and instead focus on equipping S...

item.title: Kangaru Girls Students Leave School at Night After Disciplinary Dispute Amid Heavy Rain
item.description: Parents and guardians from Embu County were thrown into worry after students from Kangaru Girls High School reportedly left school at night during heavy rain following a strike. Videos that surfaced o...

item.title: The Sathankulam Custodial Deaths of Father and Son: A Deep Dive into the Tragic Incident
item.description: The deaths of P. Jayaraj and his son J. Benicks in Tamil Nadu’s Sattankulam in June 2020 shocked the nation and led to massive protests against police brutality. The father and son were brutally tortu...

item.title: Microsoft Insiders Push to Remove Microsoft Account Requirement for Windows 11
item.description: Microsoft has received criticism for its mandatory Microsoft account requirement for installing Windows 11. While the company has made efforts to address other complaints, the account stipulation rema...

item.title: Siren Gold advances drilling at Sams Creek project, confirming strong gold resources
item.description: Siren Gold has reported positive results from its ongoing infill drilling campaign at the Sams Creek gold project in New Zealand’s South Island. Initial assays from the first six holes at the SE Trave...

item.title: The Tension Between Zionism and Orthodox Judaism: An In-Depth Analysis
item.description: In this thought-provoking article, Wole Olaoye explores the ongoing conflict involving Israel and Iran, particularly highlighting the role of Zionism and Orthodox Judaism. He reflects on the historica...
